action.reasoning: Observation: DDP fails because CLIPModel contains text_model that's unused in forward pass, causing 'Parameter indices which did not receive grad' error. Analysis: Need to remove text model from CLIPClassifier so DDP doesn't see unused parameters. Decision: Rewrite model.py to only keep vision_model (not full CLIPModel), update train.py and predict.py accordingly, add RandomVerticalFlip for satellite imagery.
